source.title: Key Lessons from the ExxonMobil Baton Rouge Refinery Isobutane Release and Fire

actions_taken: Operators shouted warnings to workers in the area
Board operator alerted via radio to shut down the unit
Emergency responders isolated the release and extinguished the fire approximately 25 minutes after ignition
event.summary: On November 22, 2016, during removal of an inoperable gearbox on a plug valve in the sulfuric acid alkylation unit, an operator removed four vertical bolts that secured both the gearbox support bracket and the pressure-retaining top-cap. When the operator attempted to open the valve with a pipe wrench, the valve came apart and released approximately 2,000 pounds of pressurized isobutane, forming a flammable vapor cloud. The vapor reached an ignition source (an energized welding machine approximately 70 feet away) within 30 seconds, causing a fire that severely burned four workers (one ExxonMobil employee and three contractors) with third-degree burns.
recommendations: Evaluate human factors associated with equipment design and apply the hierarchy of controls to mitigate identified hazards
Establish detailed and accurate written procedures and provide training to ensure workers can perform all anticipated job tasks safely
Upgrade older model plug valves (pre-1984 design) to improved design that attaches gearbox support bracket to valve body flanges rather than pressure-retaining components
Develop written procedures detailing steps for safely removing various types of plug valve gearboxes
Provide formal training to operators on how to remove gearboxes from plug valves and associated hazards
Conduct human factors evaluation during Process Hazard Analysis to identify equipment design and reliability issues
Review existing process safety management practices and equipment design for potential improvements

hazards.name: Ignition sources in the vicinity of process equipment

threats.name: Inoperable plug valve gearbox requiring manual removal
Incorrect removal of pressure-retaining bolts during gearbox removal
Valve disassembly when stem is turned with pipe wrench
Energized welding equipment operating near process equipment

consequences.name: Uncontrolled release of isobutane to atmosphere
Fire and thermal injuries to workers
Multiple worker injuries with third-degree burns

controls.name: Equipment design - improved plug valve with dedicated gearbox attachment points
controls.barrier_role: Prevent incorrect removal of pressure-retaining components
controls.lod_basis: Hierarchy of controls - highest level intervention

supporting_text: The improved valve design involves attaching the gearbox support bracket without connecting to pressure-retaining parts of the valve

Approximately 97 percent of the plug valves located in the Baton Rouge refinery's alkylation unit are the more recent Durco plug valve design, which secures the gearbox assembly to the valve body flanges
With the newer and improved valve design, if a worker completely removes the gearbox and its support bracket(s), a chemical release cannot occur

controls.name: Written procedures for plug valve gearbox removal
controls.barrier_role: Provide clear guidance on safe gearbox removal steps
controls.lod_basis: OSHA PSM standard requirement for written operating procedures

supporting_text: Baton Rouge refinery management did not provide alkylation unit workers performing this operations activity with a written procedure or training on safe gearbox removal from plug valves and its associated hazards

The Baton Rouge refinery provided the CSB with numerous training records that the company asserts it gave to its operators. None of these documents, however, addressed how to remove an inoperable gearbox from a plug valve

controls.name: Worker training on plug valve gearbox removal and hazards
controls.barrier_role: Ensure workers understand correct removal procedures and associated hazards
controls.lod_basis: OSHA PSM standard requirement for training on operating procedures and hazards

supporting_text: Despite recurring plug valve gearbox reliability issues, operators consistently stated they had not received formal training on how to remove a gearbox from a plug valve
Baton Rouge refinery operator training material lacked information about the potential consequences of attempting to remove an inoperable plug valve gearbox

In its plug valve literature, Flowserve warns users not to remove the pressure-retaining top-cap bolts, stating: WARNING: Do not loosen or remove top cap fasteners [bolts] … when removing a[] [gearbox] or accessory. This warning, however, was not communicated to Baton Rouge refinery workers

controls.name: Human factors evaluation in Process Hazard Analysis
controls.barrier_role: Identify equipment design and operational hazards through systematic analysis
controls.lod_basis: OSHA PSM standard requirement to evaluate human factors in PHA

supporting_text: In its most recent alkylation unit PHA, the Baton Rouge refinery did not document any consideration of human factors related to valve operational issues

Had the PHA human factors analysis prompted workers to discuss the removal of these gearboxes, the company could have identified the potential hazard of inadvertently taking the valve apart during gearbox removal
Baton Rouge refinery operators acknowledged to the CSB that they frequently encountered situations where the handwheel did not turn the valve

controls.name: Gearbox reliability assessment and replacement program
controls.barrier_role: Reduce frequency of gearbox failures requiring manual removal
controls.lod_basis: Preventive maintenance to eliminate root cause of threat

supporting_text: The CSB learned that there were long-standing reliability issues with gearboxes used to operate plug valves in the refinery's alkylation unit
One worker described the free spinning gearbox handwheel as a 'chronic' issue

Plug valves, such as those used in the Baton Rouge refinery alkylation unit, can be difficult to operate, and refinery records indicate that the handwheel and gearbox assembly are 'for convenience in operating a valve'

controls.name: Isolation and depressurization of valve before gearbox removal
controls.barrier_role: Eliminate pressure hazard during gearbox removal activity
controls.lod_basis: Standard precautionary measure for valve disassembly

supporting_text: According to Flowserve Corporation, valves must be relieved of process fluid and pressure prior to disassembly. This is a recommended precautionary measure
A properly trained operator performing this activity should be aware that a valve would need to be isolated, emptied, and depressured prior to opening

controls.name: Elimination or relocation of ignition sources near process equipment
controls.barrier_role: Prevent ignition of flammable vapor cloud
controls.lod_basis: Hierarchy of controls - mitigation of consequence

supporting_text: Based on surveillance video, an energized welding machine located roughly 70 feet away likely ignited the vapor cloud
The isobutane reached an ignition source within 30 seconds of the release, causing a fire

controls.name: Personal protective equipment (flame-resistant clothing)
controls.barrier_role: Reduce severity of thermal injuries from fire
controls.lod_basis: Last line of defense to minimize injury consequences

supporting_text: All four workers received third degree burn injuries. Each worker was wearing refinery-required personal protective equipment including flame-resistant clothing

controls.name: Emergency response and evacuation procedures
controls.barrier_role: Minimize exposure of workers to hazardous conditions
controls.lod_basis: Emergency response to limit consequence severity

supporting_text: Following the release, the operators shouted to others in the area, including workers on the scaffolding above, warning them of the immediate danger and ordering them to evacuate
One of the operators alerted the board operator of the emergency by radio and told him to shut down the unit
The isobutane reached an ignition source within 30 seconds of the release, causing a fire and severely burning four workers who were unable to exit the vapor cloud before it ignited

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
